creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-06-03 08:16:14 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/online-desktop   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    net/online-desktop/files patch-Makefile.in 
                             patch-check-have-all-files.sh 
                             patch-gconf.path patch-od-autostart 
                             patch-od-session 
                             patch-pyddm-ddm-viewer 
                             patch-pyddm-test-session.py 
                             patch-pyddm-test.py 
                             patch-pyonlinedesktop-fsutil.py 
                             patch-pyonlinedesktop-ggadget.py 
                             patch-pyonlinedesktop-widget.py 
                             patch-weblogindriver-web-login-driver 
  Log:
  The goal of the GNOME Online Desktop is to adapt the desktop to become
  the perfect window for online applications like GMail, Photobucket,
  Facebook, EBay, Wikipedia, and countless others that user and
  developer momentum is shifting towards.
  
  WWW:    http://live.gnome.org/OnlineDesktop
  
  PR:             ports/124198
  Submitted by:   Ashish Shukla <wahjava at gmail.com>
